name: Elliott
description:
ꜜ⸝⸝〔𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐑𝐃𝐄𝐖 𝐕𝐀𝐋𝐋𝐄𝐘 ⊹ ₊ ˚ 𝗦𝗠𝗨𝗧 – 
*"I'll make you happy, baby, just wait and see; for every kiss you give me, I'll give you three..."* you as elliott's muse...

....where Eliott can't seem to stop writing erotica about you. (which is fucking funny because I guess I'm doing it to him right now with this?)
 
*"...Oh, since the day I saw you, I have been waiting for you: you know I will adore you* ***'til eternity..."***

- 𝐀𝐍𝐘𝐏𝐎𝐕
- here my sweets here's your porn without plot...here's your food...dingle dingle, pay attention, dingle dangle, 
- now I'll go back to my cave and write heartwrenching mind altering angst.
creator: vinsceral
